name: tpl-grant-application
description: Grant application pipeline: funder research, fit scoring, application drafting, internal review, portal submission

steps.prompt: Research the grant funder: {{funder_name}} ({{funder_url}}). Our organization's mission: {{org_mission}}. Program applying for: {{program_name}} (requested amount: {{grant_amount}}, deadline: {{deadline}}). Investigate: (1) funder's stated priorities and funding history, (2) typical grantee profile and geographic/sector focus, (3) alignment signals between funder priorities and our program, (4) any known red flags or misalignments. Produce a funder research brief and assign a fit score from 1-10 with justification. Output must include a field 'fit_score' as an integer.

steps.notifyMsg: Grant opportunity from {{funder_name}} scored below threshold (fit score: {{steps.research-funder.output.fit_score}}/10). Recommend skipping this application cycle. Funder brief: {{steps.research-funder.output}}.

steps.prompt: Write a complete grant application for {{funder_name}} on behalf of our organization. Program: {{program_name}}. Requested amount: {{grant_amount}}. Deadline: {{deadline}}. Organization mission: {{org_mission}}. Impact metrics: {{impact_metrics}}. Funder research brief: {{steps.research-funder.output}}. Produce all four sections: (1) Executive Summary (250 words max) — hook with the problem, state our solution, quantify impact; (2) Program Narrative — problem statement, theory of change, implementation plan with timeline, organizational capacity; (3) Budget Justification — line-item rationale aligned to program activities, cost-effectiveness argument; (4) Evaluation Plan — SMART outcomes, data collection methods, reporting schedule. Mirror the funder's language and priorities throughout. Use formal grant-writing tone.

steps.notifyMsg: Grant application for {{funder_name}} submitted successfully. Program: {{program_name}}, Amount: {{grant_amount}}, Deadline: {{deadline}}. Submission confirmation: {{steps.submit-application.output.confirmation_id}}.
